cover.subtitle:
노태우에서 문재인까지,
직선제 30년의 기록.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a long horizontal line of seven civilian Korean presidential silhouettes in dark suits, each slightly different in posture, standing in front of a wide Cheong Wa Dae blue-tile rooftop silhouette. Below them: a single Olympic ring shape and a soccer ball silhouette suggesting Seoul 1988 and Korea-Japan 2002. Color palette: cold gray + navy + a single sky blue accent on the rooftop. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 정부별 핵심정책 매칭(북방외교=노태우, 금융실명제=김영삼, 햇빛정책=김대중, FTA=노무현, G20=이명박)과 남북정상회담 차수·연도가 자주 출제된다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of the Cheong Wa Dae rooftop curve and an Olympic ring shape (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
